message:
feat(share): migrate all snapshot/export modules from C-backed SqliteConnection to DbConn

Replace every sqlmodel_sqlite::SqliteConnection usage in the share crate with
DbConn (FrankenConnection), completing the unified connection architecture.

snapshot.rs: Replace the two-phase open (read-write for checkpoint, read-only for
backup) with a single DbConn connection. Change WAL checkpoint from PASSIVE to
TRUNCATE to fully flush WAL frames before copying. Replace SQLite online backup
API (backup_to_path) with std::fs::copy since TRUNCATE checkpoint ensures the
main DB file is self-contained.

bundle.rs, finalize.rs, scope.rs, scrub.rs: Replace all SqliteConnection::open_file
calls with DbConn::open_file. Use local type aliases (type Conn = DbConn) for
brevity. Remove comments referencing C-backed SQLite requirements. All test
helpers updated accordingly.

static_render.rs: Change import from sqlmodel_sqlite::SqliteConnection alias to
mcp_agent_mail_db::DbConn directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
